name: command_packs
summary: Loads, validates, matches, creates, and removes workspace command packs.
documentation:
Loads, validates, matches, creates, and removes workspace command packs.

## API Reference

### CommandMatch
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class CommandMatch

Resolved command pack entry for one user input.

Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: list_command_packs(request: dict[str, Any], *, query: str = '') -> dict[str, Any]

Type: function
Source: __init__.py

### match_command

Source: __init__.py

Type: function
Source: __init__.py
